attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS INCR_TIMESTAMP,
'I' AS DV_ACTION_CD,
L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD,
L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SALES_REP_NUM,
ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
SERVICE_FLG,
DV_FMV_FLG,
DV_ACTUAL_BKGS_AMT,
DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT,
DV_POS_AMT,
DV_DSV_AMT,
DV_EIS_CM_AMT,
DV_XAAS_AMT,
OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
/* Nov 8th Changes */
BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,
XCAT_FLG	
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MBR_DAILY_TMS_SUMMARY WI
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_MBR_DAILY_TMS_SUMMARY MT
WHERE 
WI.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD    	=	MT.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD AND	
WI.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT	AND
WI.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME           	=	MT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME        AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT      AND	
WI.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME             	=	MT.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME          AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT      	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT   AND	
WI.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME              	=	MT.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME           AND	
WI.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG        	=	MT.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG     AND	
WI.SALES_REP_NUM                 	=	MT.SALES_REP_NUM              AND	
WI.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME            	=	MT.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME         AND	
WI.L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.SERVICE_FLG                   	=	MT.SERVICE_FLG                AND	
WI.DV_FMV_FLG                    	=	MT.DV_FMV_FLG                 AND	
WI.DV_ACTUAL_BKGS_AMT            	=	MT.DV_ACTUAL_BKGS_AMT         AND	
WI.DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT          	=	MT.DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT       AND	
WI.DV_POS_AMT                    	=	MT.DV_POS_AMT                 AND	
WI.DV_DSV_AMT                    	=	MT.DV_DSV_AMT                 AND	
WI.DV_EIS_CM_AMT                 	=	MT.DV_EIS_CM_AMT              AND	
WI.DV_XAAS_AMT                   	=	MT.DV_XAAS_AMT				  AND
WI.OFFER_TYPE_NAME					=	MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME		  AND
WI.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG				=	MT.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG		  AND
WI.PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD			=	MT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD  AND
/* Nov 8th Changes */
WI.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME              =   MT.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME AND
WI.XCAT_FLG              =   MT.XCAT_FLG
)

SELECT 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS INCR_TIMESTAMP,
'D' AS DV_ACTION_CD,
L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD,
L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR,
FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
FISCAL_MONTH_NAME,
FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
FISCAL_WEEK_NAME,
CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG,
SALES_REP_NUM,
ERP_SALES_REP_NAME,
L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME,
SERVICE_FLG,
DV_FMV_FLG,
DV_ACTUAL_BKGS_AMT,
DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT,
DV_POS_AMT,
DV_DSV_AMT,
DV_EIS_CM_AMT,
DV_XAAS_AMT,
BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
RECURRING_OFFER_FLG,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
/* Nov 8th Changes */
BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,
XCAT_FLG
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_MBR_DAILY_TMS_SUMMARY MT
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_MBR_DAILY_TMS_SUMMARY WI
WHERE 
WI.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD    	=	MT.L0_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CD AND	
WI.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L2_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L3_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L4_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L5_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR      	=	MT.L6_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR   AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT        	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT     AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT	AND
WI.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME           	=	MT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME        AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT      AND	
WI.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME             	=	MT.FISCAL_MONTH_NAME          AND	
WI.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT      	=	MT.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT   AND	
WI.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME              	=	MT.FISCAL_WEEK_NAME           AND	
WI.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG        	=	MT.CURRENT_FISCAL_QTR_FLG     AND	
WI.SALES_REP_NUM                 	=	MT.SALES_REP_NUM              AND	
WI.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME            	=	MT.ERP_SALES_REP_NAME         AND	
WI.L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L2_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L3_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	=	MT.L4_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME	AND
WI.SERVICE_FLG                   	=	MT.SERVICE_FLG                AND	
WI.DV_FMV_FLG                    	=	MT.DV_FMV_FLG                 AND	
WI.DV_ACTUAL_BKGS_AMT            	=	MT.DV_ACTUAL_BKGS_AMT         AND	
WI.DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT          	=	MT.DV_ORACLE_ACTUAL_AMT       AND	
WI.DV_POS_AMT                    	=	MT.DV_POS_AMT                 AND	
WI.DV_DSV_AMT                    	=	MT.DV_DSV_AMT                 AND	
WI.DV_EIS_CM_AMT                 	=	MT.DV_EIS_CM_AMT              AND	
WI.DV_XAAS_AMT                   	=	MT.DV_XAAS_AMT				  AND
WI.OFFER_TYPE_NAME					=	MT.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME		  AND
WI.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG				=	MT.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG		  AND
WI.PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD			=	MT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD  AND
/* Nov 8th Changes */
WI.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME				=	MT.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME	AND
WI.XCAT_FLG				=	MT.XCAT_FLG
)
